models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    balance = Column(DECIMAL)
    credit_limit = Column(DECIMAL)
models.description: This class represents a customer in the system, including financial information.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'))
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime)
    amount_total = Column(DECIMAL)
    notes = Column(String)
models.description: This class represents an order linked to a customer with additional details and total spending.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    unit_price = Column(DECIMAL)
    amount = Column(DECIMAL)
models.description: The class represents order items with details on quantity and pricing.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(DECIMAL)
models.description: This class represents products available in the system.
models.name: Product

rules.name: Check Credit 1
rules.description: Customer's balance must be less than their credit limit
rules.code:
Rule.constraint(validate=Customer,
    as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit,
    error_msg="Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})")

rules.name: Check Credit 2
rules.description: Customer's balance is the sum of Order amount_total where date_shipped is null
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: Check Credit 3
rules.description: Order's amount_total is the sum of the Item amount

rules.name: Check Credit 4
rules.description: Item amount calculated as quantity * unit_price

rules.name: App Integration 1
rules.description: Send Order to Kafka topic 'order_shipping' if date_shipped is set.
rules.code: Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka, if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None, with_args={"topic": "order_shipping"})
